texto: Say it back," he begs.I don't. He offers those words so freely, I'm not sure he realizes how much weight they carry. You have to love yourself before you can love another. You have to see what they see in you. Something worthy.I cannot return those three words to him because I am nowhere near ready to say them to myself.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Katt Sterling sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Say it back," he begs.I don't. He offers those words so freely, I'm not sure he realizes how much…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, love-hurts, romance-love, útil em momentos de romance-love.
